raw_outputs.groq:
```json
{
  "preconditions": [
    "seq must be an iterable",
    "all elements in seq must be numeric"
  ],
  "postconditions": [
    "return value is the sum of all elements in seq as a float",
    "return value is accurate and minimizes rounding errors"
  ],
  "edge_cases": [
    "seq is an empty iterable",
    "seq contains a single element",
    "seq contains very large or very small numbers",
    "seq contains a mix of integers and floats"
  ]
}
```
raw_outputs.groq2:
```json
{
  "preconditions": [
    "seq must be an iterable",
    "all items in seq must be plain strings",
    "seq must not be empty"
  ],
  "postconditions": [
    "the result is a valid floating-point number",
    "the result is the accurate sum of values in seq"
  ],
  "edge_cases": [
    "if seq is an empty string, return 0.0",
    "if seq contains only NaN values, return NaN",
    "if seq contains only infinity values, return infinity"
  ]
}
```
raw_outputs.hf:
```json
{
  "preconditions": [
    "seq must be an iterable",
    "all items in seq must be plain strings",
    "seq must not be empty"
  ],
  "postconditions": [
    "the result is a valid floating-point number",
    "the result is an accurate sum of values in seq"
  ],
  "edge_cases": [
    "if seq is an empty string, return 0.0",
    "if seq contains only NaN or infinity values, return NaN or infinity respectively"
  ]
}
```
